summary.summary: Release preparation for v0.8.0 (release PR text included) with an internal build metadata change: Config.xcconfig's APP_DEV_VERSION was incremented across four CI commits from 0.7.0.20 to 0.7.0.24. The change touches the file Config.xcconfig and the diff shows only APP_DEV_VERSION value updates. The PR metadata includes the v0.8.0 release notes and list of contained PRs.
summary.userFacingImpact: No functional user-facing behavior is shown in the supplied diffs; the edits are limited to APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig (build/dev version metadata). If broader release contents need verification for user impact, a human review of the full PR contents is recommended.
